faculty: Chairperson David Svolba Professor Associate Professor Assistant Professor Petri Flint Sarah Bromberg Sally Moore Andrea Olmstead Jessica Robey
description: The art program provides undergraduates with a variety of studio and art history courses to increase their aesthetic awareness and skills. Minors in Art, Studio Art and Art History are available to all students.

requirement_sections.heading: Requirements for the Minor in Art
content: There is total minimum of 18 credits required, including a core of two courses (6 credits) and four elective courses (12 credits).

courses.course_title: Introduction to Studio Art: Drawing, Painting, and Sculpture

requirement_sections.heading: Elective courses 12 cr.
content: Any combination of 4 Studio Art and Art History courses, at least 2 of which must be at or above the 2000 level.
